Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, presence of glucose, bilirubin, and ketones), suggesting impaired renal function with possible nephrotic features. HbA1c is low, ruling out chronic hyperglycemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation for possible glomerular disease and assessment of underlying causes.
